input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.10.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.10.5
            TITLE: mechanical black flag

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.10.5: Mechanical Black Flag
D.12.10.5 Mechanical Black Flag 
a. May be shown for any reason to question the vehicle condition  
b. Time spent off track is not included in the Endurance Run time.

final_answer: rule D.12.10.5: Mechanical Black Flag D.12.10.5 Mechanical Black Flag a. May be shown for any reason to question the vehicle condition b. Time spent off track is not included in the Endurance Run time.
